In this lesson, you’ll learn about the two business models and what they
mean from a Facebook Ads perspective.
Two Business Models
• 	Single Produce (Hero)
• 	Multi-SKU Store
ACTION ITEM
❏ 	Fill out the Prospecting Score Card.
Prospecting Score Card
Answer the following Yes/No questions. If you answer a “Yes”, give yourself
one point.
Are you showcasing the product in your ad?
Are you showcasing the use?
Are you walking through the benefits?
Can a prospect easily locate their product when clicking on the link?
Can you navigate your website easily?
5 = Excellent
4 = Good
3 = Average
2 = Mediocre
1 = Poor
